definitions.text: prefiks som uttrykker at noe er stort eller blant de beste eller ypperste av sitt slag
definitions.translation: prefix expressing that something is among the best or supreme of its kind

definitions.text: for eksempel i supermakt, superhelt, superstjerne
definitions.translation: for example in superpower, superhero, superstar

definitions.text: i ord som superbillig, superelegant og superfornøyd
definitions.translation: in words like super cheap, super elegant, and super happy

definitions.text: prefiks som uttrykker at noe er overordnet noe annet
definitions.translation: prefix expressing that something is superior to something else
